title: NASA Live
description: NASA live: Follow live television broadcasts on NASA+, the agency's streaming service, and NASA's social media channels with this schedule of upcoming live events including news briefings, launches and landings.
text:
Upcoming Events
Friday, March 6
11:45 a.m. | Live coverage of the JAXA (Japan Aerospace Exploration Agency) HTV-X1 cargo spacecraft departure from the International Space Station. Release scheduled for 12 p.m. Stream on NASA+, Amazon Prime, YouTube
While NASA programming is free, obtaining it through third-party streaming services may require equipment purchases or subscription fees. These links are provided for your information and do not constitute NASA’s endorsement of any goods or services.
